CustomField.description: DML Statements usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.formula: IF(LimitsDmlStatementsMax__c = 0, "✅ N/A", IF(LimitsDmlStatementsConsumed__c / LimitsDmlStatementsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.DmlStatements.TransactionRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsDmlStatementsConsumed__c / LimitsDmlStatementsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.DmlStatements.TransactionAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsDmlStatementsConsumed__c / LimitsDmlStatementsMax__c * 100, 1)) & "% (" & TEXT(LimitsDmlStatementsConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(LimitsDmlStatementsMax__c) & ")" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: DML Statements usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.label: DML Statements
